title: Louisiana Department of Corrections; domicile
doc_html:
§821.1.  Louisiana Department of Corrections; domicile

The domicile of the department of corrections and its divisions shall be the parish of East Baton Rouge, city of Baton Rouge, Louisiana.  

Added by Acts 1974, No. 108, §1.
